stories.title: July 2026 CPSC Recall Roundup — Four Products Families Need to Check Now

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
COS parents — four active CPSC recalls:

• Vevor Baby Swings (suffocation)
• Baby Loungers (entrapment)
• Amazon Bath Seats (drowning)
• Kids' Robes (burn hazard)

Stop use. Details at cpsc.gov/Recalls #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings [URL]

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text: Nearly 9,000 baby bath seats recalled for drowning risk — sold on Amazon. If you have YCXXKJ or NFSVLB brand seats, stop use and check cpsc.gov/Recalls for a refund. #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings [URL]

article.headline: Check Your Baby Gear: Four Active CPSC Recalls for Sleep, Bath, and Sleepwear Products

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:
CPSC Recalls Roundup (Tier 1 — 2 concepts)

#### Image Concept A
**Slug:** story-1-cpsc-recall-warning
**Prompt:** A close-up, top-down view of a concerned parent's hands holding a small infant baby swing, inspecting the product carefully in a bright, modern nursery. Warm natural light from a window. Soft teal and white color palette. Clean, uncluttered background. Photorealistic style. The bottom third of the image shows an empty light-colored floor surface suitable for text overlay.

#### Image Concept B
**Slug:** story-1-baby-product-safety
**Prompt:** A flat-lay arrangement of generic infant and baby items (a soft lounger cushion, a baby bath seat, a small children's robe) on a clean white surface with gentle shadows. Soft overhead lighting, neutral tones of white, cream, and pale blue. Minimalist, editorial photography style. The bottom third of the image is clear white surface for text overlay.

---

stories.title: Fire Danger Update — Stage II Restrictions + Burn Ban Now in Effect for July 4 Weekend

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Colorado Springs before July 4:

🔥 Stage II fire restrictions now in effect (highest level)
🔥 Burn ban active since June 29

Consumer fireworks permanently banned in COS. Violations: up to $2,650 + possible jail.

#COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids [URL]

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text: CSPD has specific officers assigned for July 4 fireworks enforcement in COS. The penalty for violating the city fireworks ordinance: up to $2,650 fine + mandatory court + 189 days in jail. #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings [URL]

article.headline: COS Is Under a Burn Ban and Stage II Fire Restrictions — What That Means for July 4

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:
Stage II Fire Restrictions + Burn Ban (Tier 1 — 2 concepts)

#### Image Concept A
**Slug:** story-2-fire-restrictions-mountains
**Prompt:** A wide landscape photograph of dry Colorado foothills and mountains under a hazy summer sky, golden dry grasses in the foreground, red rock formations in the middle distance, pale blue and gold sky. No people, no fire, no fireworks. Conveying heat and dryness. Photorealistic, golden hour lighting. The bottom third of the frame is wide open dry grassland for text overlay.

#### Image Concept B
**Slug:** story-2-fireworks-warning
**Prompt:** A Colorado Springs family (parents and two children, shown from behind as silhouettes) watching a distant professional fireworks display light up the night sky over a mountain range. Safe viewing from a grassy park lawn. Deep blue and purple night sky, colorful bursts of yellow and red fireworks in the distance. Warm, safe, celebratory mood. The bottom third of the image is dark lawn grass for text overlay.

---

stories.title: July 4 Daytime Picks — Rock Ledge Ranch and WWII Aviation Museum for COS Families

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Two daytime July 4 options for COS families:

Rock Ledge Ranch — 10 AM–4 PM, $7–$13 (kids 3 & under free). Civil War history + kids' parade.

WWII Aviation Museum — 10 AM–5 PM. Vintage aircraft, military vehicle rides.

#COSParenting #ColoradoSprings [URL]

article.headline: Before the Fireworks: Two Daytime July 4 Options for COS Families

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:
July 4 Daytime Options (Tier 2 — 1 concept)

#### Image Concept A
**Slug:** story-3-july4-daytime-family
**Prompt:** A family with two young children exploring an outdoor historic site on a bright sunny day — walking along a gravel path between rustic wooden structures, wearing summer clothes, patriotic red and blue colors. Festive Fourth of July atmosphere, cheerful and active. Warm natural sunlight, green trees in the background, American flag bunting visible on buildings. Photorealistic style. The bottom third of the image shows the gravel path for text overlay.

stories.title: D49 Back-to-School Timeline — Key Dates Starting July 24

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
D49 back-to-school dates to know:

July 24 — New Teacher Orientation
July 28 — Teachers Return
July 30 — Professional Development
August — First Day of School

A new Student Success Center opens with the 2026–27 school year.

#COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids [URL]

article.headline: D49 Teachers Are Back July 28 — Key Back-to-School Dates Colorado Springs Families Should Know

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:
D49 Back-to-School Timeline (Tier 2 — 1 concept)

#### Image Concept A
**Slug:** story-4-back-to-school-supplies
**Prompt:** A child's backpack open on a wooden table, surrounded by neatly organized school supplies — pencils, notebooks, colored markers, a ruler — in bright primary colors of red, blue, and yellow. Summer sunlight streaming in through a window, creating a warm glow. Clean, cheerful, organized feel. Photorealistic style. The bottom third of the image is the wooden table surface for text overlay.

stories.title: PPLD Summer Adventure — 30 Days Left to Log Activities and Win Prizes

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
30 days left in PPLD's Summer Adventure.

Program ends July 31. Free for all ages. No registration required.

Grand prizes: Broadmoor Cloud Camp stay + Pikes Peak Attractions VIP pass.

Sign up: ppld.org/summer or Beanstack app. #COSParenting #PikesPeakParenting [URL]

article.headline: One Month Left: PPLD Summer Adventure Ends July 31 — Here's How to Finish Strong

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:
PPLD Summer Adventure Final Month (Tier 2 — 1 concept)

#### Image Concept A
**Slug:** story-5-summer-reading-library
**Prompt:** Two children (elementary school age) sitting side by side on colorful cushions in a bright, airy library, each reading a book. Bookshelves full of colorful books in the background. Warm, inviting atmosphere with sunlight through tall windows. Teal and coral color accents in the decor. Happy, engaged expressions. Photorealistic style. The bottom third of the frame is the library floor with soft rugs for text overlay.
